text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Those libraries are not needed to be installed at all. 
However, my files/patch-aa just didn't work (braino), and 
i missed libbfd.a and libopcodes.a anyway. 

Fixed in rev 1.2 of files/patch-aa, neither of the libs is 
going to be installed now.
